description_long: This is a metallic beverage can with a glossy copper-orange finish and a standard cylindrical shape, slightly tapering at the top. The front features bold white text reading 'ORIGINIUM SODA' above two faceted dice graphics and the word 'SANITY+++.' The lower band is black with additional branding and a volume label of 420 mL. The back displays a detailed nutrition facts panel, ingredients list, and a QR code, all in white text. The can has a typical pull-tab opening on the top, made of silver metal. There are no visible dents, scratches, or signs of wear, and the surface is highly reflective.
description: A glossy copper-orange soda can labeled 'ORIGINIUM SODA' with detailed branding and a pull-tab top. The can is metallic, cylindrical, and features nutrition facts and graphics.
description_view_0: Front view showing 'ORIGINIUM SODA' branding, dice graphics, and 'SANITY+++' text.
description_view_1: Side view with minimal visible text, mostly showing the copper-orange metallic surface and part of the black lower band.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the nutrition facts panel, ingredients list, and QR code in white text.
description_view_3: Angled side view showing the transition between the front branding and the nutrition facts, with the black band and copper finish visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: Front: 'ORIGINIUM SODA' in bold white text, dice graphics, 'SANITY+++' below, black band with 'ORIGINIUM-AKETON FLAVOR MIX' and '420 ML'; Back: white nutrition facts, ingredients, QR code.
